The '''C4-CZN ion field gun''' was tripod-mountable [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], ideal for providing infantry with anti-starship or anti-vehicle firepower.

Operatives working for [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForce]] used a C4-CZN to repel an attack from two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttles]] on [[Level 88]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
